title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: EMEA is executing the world's largest synchronized crypto regulatory activation through September 2026. The EU's MiCA framework transitions from law to operational enforcement as AMLA begins direct supervision of high-risk CASPs across 27 member states, while 211 firms have already secured authorization and 149 remain non-compliant. Parallel momentum in UK stablecoin frameworks, Middle East VASP licensing regimes, and emerging African regulatory structures creates immediate compliance infrastruc
